puzzle.hint: Divine forgiveness — the merciful pardon that erases past sins, promised to those who believe and do good deeds
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ ۙ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَأَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
puzzle.verse: 5:9 - Allāh has promised those who believe and do righteous deeds [that] for them there is forgiveness and great reward.
